creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: lippe
Date: Wed Mar  6 17:27:37 2013
New Revision: 313530
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/313530

Log:
  - Update to 0.39.
  - Pass maintainership to submitter.
  
  PR:		ports/176630
  Submitted by:	Danilo Egea Gondolfo <danilogondolfo@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/devel/libopensync/Makefile
  head/devel/libopensync/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/libopensync/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/devel/libopensync/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/libopensync/Makefile	Wed Mar  6 17:18:45 2013	(r313529)
+++ head/devel/libopensync/Makefile	Wed Mar  6 17:27:37 2013	(r313530)
@@ -1,27 +1,22 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	libopensync
-# Date created:		2005-06-19
-# Whom:			Michael Johnson <ahze@FreeBSD.org>
-#
+# Created by: Michael Johnson <ahze@FreeBSD.org>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	libopensync
-PORTVERSION=	0.36
-PORTREVISION=	2
+PORTVERSION=	0.39
 CATEGORIES=	devel
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.opensync.org/download/releases/${PORTVERSION}/
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	danilogondolfo@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	A PIM data synchronization framework
 
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	swig1.3:${PORTSDIR}/devel/swig13
-LIB_DEPENDS=	sqlite3.8:${PORTSDIR}/databases/sqlite3
-RUN_DEPENDS=	swig1.3:${PORTSDIR}/devel/swig13
+LIB_DEPENDS=	exslt:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/libxslt
 
 CONFLICTS=	libopensync-0.22*
 
+USE_SQLITE=	3
+USE_PKGCONFIG=	yes
 USE_BZIP2=	yes
-USE_GCC=	any
 USE_CMAKE=	yes
 CMAKE_ARGS+=	-Wno-dev
 USE_GNOME=	glib20 libxml2
@@ -29,19 +24,30 @@ USE_PYTHON=	yes
 USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
 CMAKE_ARGS+=	-DPYTHON_INCLUDE_PATH:PATH=${PYTHON_INCLUDEDIR}
 
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS
+
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 
-SWIG_VER!=	cd ${PORTSDIR}/devel/swig13 && ${MAKE} -V PORTVERSION
-SWIG_DATADIR!=	cd ${PORTSDIR}/devel/swig13 && ${MAKE} -V DATADIR
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
+PLIST_FILES+=	%%DOCSDIR%%/OpenSync-WhitePaper.pdf
+PLIST_DIRS+=	%%DOCSDIR%%
+.endif
+
+SWIG_VER=	$$(cd ${PORTSDIR}/devel/swig13 && ${MAKE} -V PORTVERSION)
+SWIG_DATADIR=	$$(cd ${PORTSDIR}/devel/swig13 && ${MAKE} -V DATADIR)
 
 post-patch:
-	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e "s|\$${LIB_INSTALL_DIR}/pkgconfig|${PREFIX}/libdata/pkgconfig|" \
+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e "s|\$${LIBDATA_INSTALL_DIR}/pkgconfig|${PREFIX}/libdata/pkgconfig|" \
 		-e "s|FIND_PACKAGE( SWIG|FIND_PACKAGE( SWIG REQUIRED|" \
 		-e "/FIND_PACKAGE( Check )/d" ${WRKSRC}/CMakeLists.txt
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e "s|/usr/local/share/swig1.3|${SWIG_DATADIR}/${SWIG_VER}|g" \
 		${WRKSRC}/cmake/modules/FindSWIG.cmake
 
 post-install:
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
+	${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/docs/OpenSync-WhitePaper.pdf ${DOCSDIR}
+.endif
 	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
 
 .include <bsd.port.post.mk>
